name: rty-test-plugin
description: Reference plugin demonstrating all supported primitives for Codex CLI: skills and MCP servers.

interface.shortDescription: Reference plugin for validating hub-distributed plugin primitives.
interface.longDescription: Demonstrates skills and MCP server configuration as supported by Codex CLI. Hooks are NOT supported at the plugin layer in Codex — use the rty-test-plugin skill to validate active primitives.
